texts.value: Your data protection is our priority. We handle all information with high-end encryption standards in line with international data laws. We collect only necessary device analytics to ensure service stability and security.

texts.nodeName: I agree to the Terms of Service and understand the rules and policies of the platform. This agreement governs your use of our services and any associated hardware products provided by the ecosystem.
path: I agree to the Terms of Service and understand the rules and policies of the platform. This agreement governs your use of our services and any associated hardware products provided by the ecosystem.
texts.value: Information may be shared with trusted partners solely to enhance your smart home experience. We do not sell your personal behavior data to third-party advertising networks.

texts.nodeName: I agree to the Terms of Service and understand the rules and policies of the platform. This agreement governs your use of our services and any associated hardware products provided by the ecosystem.
path: I agree to the Terms of Service and understand the rules and policies of the platform. This agreement governs your use of our services and any associated hardware products provided by the ecosystem.
texts.value:
Stay updated with the latest smart home features,
maintenance alerts, and exclusive offers. You can
opt-out at any time from your account settings.
